description: Checkbox input with label, help text, indeterminate state, and disabled support. Renders a custom styled checkbox with animated check/dash marks.

examples.title: Basic checkbox
examples.code: <TmCheckbox @bind-Value="agreeToTerms" Label="I agree to the terms and conditions" />

examples.title: Checkbox with help text and indeterminate state
examples.code: <TmCheckbox @bind-Value="selectAll" Label="Select all items" HelpText="This will select all visible rows" Indeterminate="@isSomeSelected" />
